Rebuild burrow-api (feat image) + --force-recreate stale burrow-web (dangling nginx upstream IP)
Verify control plane healthy: db:ok, compute:ok (real Proxmox auth) at :8081
Prove ADR-0015 store on real infra: admin-secret (argon2) set + proxmox token stored last4 7640 (redundant)
Store gitToken last4 lg83 (the real worker-boot unblock) + bump TTYD_TIMEOUT=600 + recreate api

remaining_tasks.name: ACC-01 CREATE step: create workspace (thezoid/fable-test) in browser at :8081, watch den01 worker journal -> green (Listening on 7681) vs auth-fail
Finish H9 gate: terminal (live claude) -> stop -> start -> destroy on the real worker
Commit + deploy the H2 error-honesty fix (M workspaceService.py TransportError + test_wait_ttyd.py) so a mid-boot failure surfaces an honest 502 not a masked 500

blockers.description: Worker boot green not yet confirmed (the ACC-01 gate itself)
blockers.workaround: TTYD_TIMEOUT=600 makes a failing worker linger ~10min for journal inspection on den01

blockers.description: PAT (last4 lg83) must have clone rights on BOTH BraveBearStudios/burrow (CONFIG_REPO) AND thezoid/fable-test (project). Single global token reused for both clones
blockers.workaround: classic repo-scope PAT spans both owners; fine-grained (per-owner) cannot

human_actions_pending.action: In the browser at http://10.0.1.38:8081/ create a workspace on thezoid/fable-test and click Create
human_actions_pending.context: ACC-01 create step; synchronous, waits up to TTYD_TIMEOUT=600

human_actions_pending.action: If worker auth-fails: add the named repo to the lg83 PAT, re-POST {gitToken}, re-create
human_actions_pending.context: the journal 'cloning <config|project> repo' line names which repo the PAT lacked

decisions.decision: Deploy the feat/gui-managed-secrets branch on the host (not main)
decisions.rationale: only feat carries the ADR-0015 credential store + BURROW_SECRET_KEY reader; main ignores the key
the proxmox token already worked via .env (compute:ok); the real worker-boot blocker is the private-repo git-clone 401
nginx resolves the upstream burrow-api IP once at startup; an api recreate can dangle it -> 502

next_action: Browser: create a workspace on thezoid/fable-test at http://10.0.1.38:8081/, then immediately on den01 run: W=$(pct list | awk 'NR>1 && $1>=969 && $1<=1022 {print $1; exit}'); pct exec "$W" -- journalctl -u burrow-worker -b -f
context_notes: Base deploy is fully healthy on feat @ 9a9b197 (api healthy, web recreated, compute:ok real Proxmox). ADR-0015 store proven end-to-end via the API (no GUI on feat). Both creds now in /data/burrow.db encrypted: proxmox 7640 (redundant), git lg83 (the unblock). We paused right before the payoff: creating a real workspace and confirming the worker clones both repos with the lg83 PAT and execs ttyd on :7681. Deep state lives in the burrow-deploy + burrow-secret-mgmt-feature auto-memories (updated this session).
